author: design-phase-1b-style-md-c138
content: Plan: Implement all vitreous_style types per design doc. Order: (1) color.rs - Color struct with RGBA f32 storage, constructors (rgb/rgba/hex/hsl/hsla), manipulation (lighten/darken/mix/with_alpha), named constants. (2) font.rs - FontWeight/FontFamily/FontStyle/TextAlign/TextOverflow enums. (3) dimension.rs - Dimension enum, Edges, Corners with From impls, pct() helper. (4) animation.rs - Easing, Transition, Animation, Keyframe, AnimatableProperty, AnimationIterations, AnimationDirection, Shadow. (5) style.rs - Style struct aggregating all visual properties with CursorIcon and Overflow. (6) theme.rs - Theme struct with semantic palette, presets. (7) lib.rs - re-exports. Zero external deps, pure type vocabulary crate.
